gist.headline: Extra, Extra!
gist.blurb: The hive's daily news has been automatically pinned to the README.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README file to include the latest news entries.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most recent updates directly on the project's front page.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) pinning a newspaper to a bulletin board while Polly the bee watches.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a tiny pixelated newspaper to a wooden bulletin board. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny newsboy cap. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
